bio.heading: Who is Brendan?
description: Starting as a curious computer information systems student at the University of Akron, I quickly gravitated towards practical applications of my studies. Over the years, I've transitioned from academic exercises to impactful real-world projects.

I've developed and maintained full-stack applications for diverse industries, ensuring robust cybersecurity measures and optimizing IT infrastructure for companies such as Empire Die Casting Co. and the Chamber of Commerce.

experience.title: System Administrator
experience.description: Sole IT Contractor responsible for managing comprehensive IT infrastructure, including servers, firewalls, and over 100 computers. Implemented cybersecurity protocols and handled diverse technology troubleshooting, ensuring smooth operations and robust security.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
experience.description: Developed and maintained full-stack web applications using Next.js, React, and Node.js, focusing on security and user experience. Collaborated on the implementation of secure login functions and deployment on Vercel.

experience.title: Information Technology Support Specialist
experience.description: Supported internal IT operations and the maintenance of servers and web infrastructure, ensuring operational continuity for local businesses.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Information Systems, Minor in Business
education.description: Academic focus on developing robust IT solutions and understanding business impacts, complemented by technical training in Java, Spring, SQL, and JavaScript.
Completed intensive training in full-stack development, emphasizing practical applications and real-world coding challenges.

capabilities.name: Full Stack Development
capabilities.description: Developed user-centric web applications using React, NextJS, and Node.js.

capabilities.name: Cybersecurity
capabilities.description: Implemented robust cybersecurity measures and conducted penetration testing to secure applications and infrastructure.

capabilities.name: IT Infrastructure Management
capabilities.description: Managed servers, firewalls, and extensive computer networks, ensuring efficient and secure operations.

expertise.name: React and Next.js
expertise.description: Developed full-stack web applications enhancing user experience and functionality.

expertise.name: Java and Spring Boot
expertise.description: Utilized in backend development for web applications, focusing on scalable, efficient solutions.

expertise.name: C++
expertise.description: Developed multiple CRUD applications as well as exploring data structures and algorithms during my Education at the University of Akron.

expertise.name: NoSQL and SQL
expertise.description: Experienced with NoSql databases such as MongoDB and SQL databases such as MySQL and Sqlite. My experience with NoSQL databases includes creating and maintaining databases for web applications, and my experience with SQL comes from a programming bootcamp as well as my education at the University of Akron.
